name: @org/mfe-starter-kit
description: Production-grade Angular Microfrontend Starter Kit using Native Federation (polyrepo)

scripts.build:all: npm run build:contracts && concurrently "cd packages/mfe-shell && ng build" "cd packages/mfe-products && ng build" "cd packages/mfe-checkout && ng build"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/mfe-contracts && npm install && cd ../mfe-shell && npm install && cd ../mfe-products && npm install && cd ../mfe-checkout && npm install && cd ../docs-starter-kit && npm install
scripts.test:all: cd packages/mfe-contracts && npm test && cd ../mfe-shell && npm test && cd ../mfe-products && npm test && cd ../mfe-checkout && npm test && cd ../docs-starter-kit && npm test
scripts.test:coverage:all: cd packages/mfe-contracts && npm run test:coverage && cd ../mfe-shell && npm run test:coverage && cd ../mfe-products && npm run test:coverage && cd ../mfe-checkout && npm run test:coverage && cd ../docs-starter-kit && npm run test:coverage
